info.name: OrderFlow — E2E Business Flows
info.description: E2E-коллекция по основным бизнес-флоу ТЗ для ролей ADMIN / SUPPLIER / RETAIL_CHAIN. Запускать сверху вниз через Postman Runner или Newman через `run-e2e.ps1`.

exec: pm.test('Gateway health is UP', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Seeded supplier login OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Seeded retail login OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Supplier verification search returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Retail verification search returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 3.1 Search published products with current partnership state

exec: pm.test('Retail product search returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.expect(supplier, 'Seed supplier must be present in supplier base').to.exist;

item.name: 3.8 Search published products after partnership activation

exec: pm.test('Retail product search returned after partnership activation', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.expect(target, 'Activated partnership should expose the generated product').to.exist;
pm.test('Multipart payment proof uploaded', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Customer chat message sent', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Supplier chat reply sent', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

item.name: 5.1 Create direct order for discrepancy flow

exec: pm.test('Legacy payment proof accepted', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Payment confirmed for discrepancy order', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('TTN generated for discrepancy order', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Discrepancy order details returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Admin ticket list returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

formdata.value: Проблема взята в работу, смотрите вложение.

exec: pm.test('Admin ticket reply created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Admin moderation list returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Admin restored product visibility', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
